home.subtitle: Women in Tech @ ZHAW School of Engineering
home.intro: We are a community of women in technology at ZHAW School of Engineering. Our goal is to support each other, share knowledge, and build a network that empowers everyone.

about.title: About us
about.mission: She Shapes Tech is dedicated to empowering, connecting and supporting women in technology.

values.title: Community
values.desc: We support each other and create a space where everyone feels welcome.

values.title: Empowerment
values.desc: We strengthen women in technical professions and degree programs.

values.title: Networking
values.desc: We build bridges between students, alumni and industry.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Upcoming Events
events.home_desc: Open evenings, real conversations and new connections – for students at ZHAW School of Engineering.
events.may7_title: Ask Engineers – from Study to Industry
events.may7_desc: Meet engineers from industry and ask your questions about careers, salaries, work-life balance and real experiences — open, honest, without taboos.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.subtitle: Our partners and supporters
sponsors.intro: We thank our sponsors who make She Shapes Tech possible.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
